description_long: This is a seated child figure with a rounded face, wearing a one-piece outfit that covers the arms and legs. The child has a headband with a bow, and the head is bald or closely shaved. The hands are open with individually modeled fingers, and the feet are covered with soft-looking shoes or booties. The clothing appears to be form-fitting, with a distinct separation between the upper and lower garment sections. The overall appearance is that of a young toddler, with soft, smooth contours and a gentle, childlike form.
description: A seated toddler with a headband and bow, dressed in a one-piece outfit with covered feet and open hands. The figure has a smooth, rounded appearance and soft, childlike features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the child's face, headband with bow, open hands, and the full front of the one-piece outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the bow on the headband, and the side of the outfit and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the headband, and the back of the one-piece outfit with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the child's profile, the headband, and the right side of the outfit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve one-piece romper with footed bottoms and a headband with a bow
attribute_hairstyle: bald or very closely shaved head
attribute_posture: sitting with legs forward and arms slightly outstretched
